arts.ttl: Why Man City have quietly signed a fourth centre-back this month as transfer plans confirmed
arts.sum: Manchester City have made their fourth and fifth signings of an active transfer window with centre-backs Jumah Bah and Christian McFarlane confirmed as signings on Monday.

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker reveals ‘uncomfortable’ exit talks with Pep Guardiola after joining AC Milan
arts.sum: The 34-year-old Manchester City and England defender has joined Milan on loan until the end of the season with an option to stay permanently in the summer

arts.ttl: Entourage ‘formally denies’ offering Manchester City player to Barcelona – Winter exit claims quickly rubbished
arts.sum: Jérémy Doku’s entourage have dismissed claims of offering him to Barcelona on a loan deal in the winter market. That’s according to Belgian Journalist Sacha Tavolieri, and he took to X, formerly known as Twitter, to provide the 22-year-old’s stance. arts.ttl: Kyle Walker risks wrath of Pep Guardiola with prediction after leaving Man City
arts.sum: Kyle Walker sealed a loan move to AC Milan last week after deciding to leave Manchester City, and the veteran defender is now out to beat them to Champions League glory

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Club Brugge preview: Losing would be "painful" - but could Pep Guardiola's side benefit from early Champions League exit?
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney tells Sports Mole that defeat at home to Club Brugge in the Champions League on Wednesday would be "painful", but elimination from the competition could actually benefit the club this season.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola personal call to bring Inter Miami star to Manchester City – Initially said yes to move
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola identified Inter Miami’s Sergio Busquets as a ‘secret candidate’ to replace Rodri, according to Sport. Rodri has been on the sidelines since suffering a serious knee injury in September.
